title: Campaign in the Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster

The [[Alliance of Free Planets]] strike force led by the ''[[Sibwarra]]'' engaged in a '''campaign''' in the [[Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster]] as they fought the remains of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]].

Just after the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] departed from their [[Assault on Lwhekk|punitive raid]], a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] task force led by the recently renovated [[Sibwarra|''Shriwirr'']] (renamed ''Sibwarra'' by the New Republic) arrived. They took note of the large-scale damage, and attempted to negotiate a truce with the Ssi-ruuk. When that proved futile, the New Republic fleet engaged in another punitive battle against the [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] invasion fleet under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Ivpikkis]], then departed on [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] orders to aid in the [[Liberation of Clak'dor VII|liberation]] of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]]. [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] believed that Ivpikkis commanded the Ssi-ruuvi forces in that engagement.

It would be many years until Lwhekk fully recovered from the attacks.
